architecture_summary: Add maturity_label as a deterministic read-model projection over the existing C0-C7 capability maturity ladder. The runtime derives labels through maturity_label_for_level, the schema rejects mismatched labels, gateway read models and governed records expose the label for operator scanability, and admission decisions continue to use maturity_level, production_ready, and autonomy_ready as the authority-bearing fields.
data_model_changes: CapabilityMaturityAssessment gains a derived maturity_label field
CapabilityRegistryMaturityProjector adds maturity_label to governed capability records
Gateway maturity read models gain capability_maturity_label_counts
Operator capability read models gain maturity_label_counts
No persisted registry, capability pack, or tenant-state migration is required
rollback_plan: Remove the maturity_label field, label helper, label counts, schema property, console column, documentation paragraphs, and tests, then rerun focused gateway tests, SDLC artifact validation, schema validation, and workspace governance preflight. C0-C7 admission gates remain intact during rollback.
migration_plan: No migration is required because the change adds a deterministic derived read-model field and schema contract. Existing consumers can continue reading maturity_level, production_ready, and autonomy_ready.
